title: Ada Da En Meethu Lyrics Pathinaaru Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Hariharan, Bella Shinde
Song: Ada Da En Meethu
Lyrics : Snehan
Movie Name : Pathinaaru

Ada Da En Meethu devadhai vasanai
Kadhal Idhuvo...
Unnaye enengum kattidum katchigal
Kadhal Idhuvo

Unnai kanum, varam podhum
Edhirkalam vasam vasam varum
Vali-padhai, maram yaavum
Enakaga mazhai mazhai tharum

Yaaro unnai ennai yaar serthadho
Yaaro vasam thannai yaar parthadho
Uyril oru kodi vanavil poothidum
Kadhal Idhuvo...
Edhire ne vandhal vanavil thondridum
kadhal adhuvo ..

Ramyam thadhumbum kanavu
Unnai kandadhum pirandhadhe
Kangalil vazhiyum neeril
Indru, sakkarai thiraludhe

Poi varum veedhiyil yeno
Pudhu vasanai kamaludhe
Kadhalin padalai ingae
Iru jeeven paadidudhe

la la la lal laala
lala lala la..
Mounam vandhu idiyai pola
Manadhil meedhu vizhundhadho
Kadhalile nammai nam ilandhom
Unmai nam unarndhom
En kalandhom,Nam kanavil
Naam azhaindhom

Katrinil azhayum iravil
Indha paravai udhirthadho
Kadhalil mayangum mandhu
Andha kadavuzhum thoduthadho..

Pootiya kadhavin idukil
Pudhu vezhicham nuzhaindhadho ..
Thaimaiyin viralai kondu
Nammai kadhalum varududho...

Unnai kanda nazhil irundhu
Enadhu vazhkai kidaithadho.
Ennuyirai thirakum saavi
Unnadhu uyiril irukudhe ..
Kadhazhiye idhu vesam illai
ingu pedham illai
Edhum illai
pani thuzhiyil sayam illai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Ada Da En Meethu?

The song is sung by Hariharan and Bella Shinde.

Who composed the music for the movie Pathinaaru?

The music was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What is the theme of the song Ada Da En Meethu?

The song portrays the emotions of love and longing between the lead characters.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Pathinaaru?

The movie stars Shiva and Madhu Shalini in lead roles.

When was the movie Pathinaaru released?

The movie was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ada Da En Meethu from the movie Pathinaaru, released in 2011, features the lead pair Shiva and Madhu Shalini. Sung by Hariharan and Bella Shinde, with lyrics penned by Snehan and music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, this romantic duet captures the tender emotions of love and longing. The melodious tune and heartfelt lyrics beautifully portray the connection between the characters. It remains a cherished piece in Tamil cinema's musical repertoire, evoking feelings of warmth and affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Ada Da En Meethu from the movie Pathinaaru, a harmonious blend of Yuvan Shankar Raja's soulful music and the mesmerizing voices of Hariharan and Bella Shinde. This romantic duet captures the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless addition to Tamil cinema's musical legacy. Dive into this captivating tune and let its heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: This is a divine fragrance of love. It is everywhere, binding you in its sights. This is love.
Seeing you is enough, the waiting time will come. The path of pain will bring rain for me.
Who has brought you to me? Who has seen you? In life, a million colors bloom. This is love... If you come in front of me, love will emerge from the colors.
The dream of Ramya is born when I see you. In my eyes, today, sweetness flows.
In the street where lies come, a new fragrance blooms. The song of love is here, singing for both lives.
la la la lal laala lala lala la.. Silence has come like a storm, falling on my heart. In love, we have become one. We have realized the truth, we have merged, we have cried in our dreams.
In the rain, the bird has flown away. This love is a sweet intoxication, and that door has opened.
In the new story's embrace, a new beginning has emerged. With the mother's hand, love will come to us.
From the path where I saw you, my life has been found. The breath that awakens me is in your soul. This is not a disguise, there is no shame here, nothing is left in the work of the rain.
This is a divine fragrance of love. It is everywhere, binding you in its sights. This is love.
Seeing you is enough, the waiting time will come. The path of pain will bring rain for me.
Who has brought you to me? Who has seen you? In life, a million colors bloom. This is love... If you come in front of me, love will emerge from the colors.
